_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of technology vendor evaluation methodologies for data and AI platforms, including RFP and RFI processes, proof-of-concept design, total cost of ownership analysis, and vendor risk assessment.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-006 (AB, cosine: 0.424), LS-S-013 (LS, cosine: 0.415).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.5/10 (raw 0.248). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [commercial, industry, lotl, ttps] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, analysis, assessment, concept, cost, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.851 (P=0.859, R=0.844). Balanced P/R — the 5-word DCWF element and 27-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of industry/commercial LoTL TTPs." and "Knowledge of technology vendor evaluation methodologies for data and AI platform" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.450 > STS 0.248 (gap +0.202). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [commercial, industry, lotl, ttps]. WIDAI-only: [ai, analysis, assessment, concept, cost, data].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.202 with low STS 0.248. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
